steps.title: Identify the student's goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the different locations of the two rivers — Africa vs. Asia.

steps.title: Choose the answer that emphasizes location
steps.content:
Choice B directly states both locations (“The Niger River is in Africa, whereas the Indus River is located in Asia”) and uses “whereas” to highlight the contrast.

Choices A, C, and D focus on length, ranking, or only one river instead.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
